rows.label: qev013303_MSG0001
rows.name: Ah! You're [ST:playername ]![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0002
rows.name:
So it really was you who told me to 
escape south![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0003
rows.name:
Heh! I thought I heard a familiar voice 
over the radio![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_JNK0010
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev013303_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Bates if he's hurt.

rows.label: qev013303_JNK0020
rows.name: Chide

rows.label: qev013303_SEL0021
rows.name: Reprimand Bates for acting irresponsibly.

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0004
rows.name:
I'm fine. Thanks to you, 
I didn't get a single scratch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0024
rows.name:
Man, I never thought there'd be a Nopon caravan 
so close by![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0005
rows.name:
By hiding here, the black Doll searching for me 
gave up and disappeared somewhere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0006
rows.name:
I can't argue back today. 
You saved my life, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0007
rows.name:
If you hadn't told me to escape south... 
I definitely would have been killed by that black Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Hey, we're getting a transmission. 
Could it be from Larry-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0009
rows.name: ...This is Larry, how is the transmission quality?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0010
rows.name:
According to Peter, you went to save Bates, 
but how is it? Is the little chick still alive?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0011
rows.name:
Larry-san! 
I'm perfectly fine! 
And I'm not a little chick anymore![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0012
rows.name:
Thank goodness, if you're like that then you seem fine. 
In that case, [ST:playername ]... 
Here is your next mission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0013
rows.name:
I received a message from Captain Corondas 
saying he's at Banshee Cave in the White Tree Continent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0014
rows.name:
It seems they were attacked immediately after 
the radio connected, and the transmission cut off, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0015
rows.name: Please, bring the Captain back to NLA alive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_JNK0030
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev013303_SEL0031
rows.name: Agree to help no matter what.

rows.label: qev013303_JNK0040
rows.name: Resist

rows.label: qev013303_SEL0041
rows.name: Say that you're not confident you can pull it off.

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0016
rows.name:
...You really are reliable, as expected. 
Just like Captain Corondas.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0017
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, then. 
Please be extremely careful of the black Doll.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0018
rows.name:
...It certainly isn't a simple operation. 
I understand your unease.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0019
rows.name:
Even so, you're the only one we have. 
...I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0020
rows.name:
...I'm sorry we're so powerless. 
It's frustrating, but I'll return from here. 
Please go save Captain Corondas.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0021
rows.name:
Everyone joined this team because 
they looked up to the Captain... 
Corondas's team exists because of him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0022
rows.name:
If he dies, even if we survive, 
Corondas's team will be finished.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013303_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Promise me. 
You must save the Captain safely.[ST:wait ]
